validation_queries.description: Verify that 'rocm_ompt_api' appears in category at least 100 times in table regions
validation_queries.error_message: 'rocm_ompt_api' category entries are fewer than expected in regions
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM regions WHERE category = 'rocm_ompt_api';

validation_queries.description: Check for any NULL values in the 'name' column of regions
validation_queries.error_message: NULL entries found in the name column of regions
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM regions WHERE name IS NULL;

validation_queries.description: Verify that 'rocm_ompt_api' string is present in the table
validation_queries.error_message: 'rocm_ompt_api' string not found in the table rocpd_string
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_string WHERE string LIKE '%rocm_ompt_api%';

validation_queries.description: Verify that 'rocm_hsa_api' appears in category at least 500 times in table regions
validation_queries.error_message: 'rocm_hsa_api' category entries are fewer than expected in regions
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM regions WHERE category = 'rocm_hsa_api';

validation_queries.description: Ensure there are no HSA API calls that last 0 seconds
validation_queries.error_message: Found HSA API captures where duration is 0
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM regions WHERE category = 'rocm_hsa_api' AND duration = 0;

validation_queries.description: Check for any NULL values in the 'name' column of regions
validation_queries.error_message: NULL entries found in the name column of regions
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM regions WHERE name IS NULL;

validation_queries.description: Verify that 'rocm_hsa_api' string is present in the table
validation_queries.error_message: 'rocm_hsa_api' string not found in the table rocpd_string
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_string WHERE string LIKE '%rocm_hsa_api%';
